source_fact_summary: The public issue says a code agent implemented issue-provided excludeFiles and excludeDirs lists verbatim for documentation sidebar filtering. The enumerated list missed a template file under docs/ADRs, so the scaffold/template artifact could leak into the sidebar until a pattern-based helper replaced the hardcoded list.
category_change_reason: No category change suggested: the source describes an incomplete fixed file/directory exclusion list rather than logic based on actual directory contents or patterns.
privacy_findings: Only public GitHub issue or PR links and short factual summaries are retained; no credentials, private files, raw logs, or local absolute paths were copied.
severity_reason: The behavior causes generated navigation to include unintended template files, but the impact is limited to documentation/sidebar generation.
missing_information: Manual review should verify the exact omitted file and the corrected pattern-based implementation.
scope_reason: The case is an Agent-authored code artifact whose fixed list fails for an equivalent project file layout. File/config inspection and a fixture containing the omitted template can independently detect the hardcoding.
notes: Codex review suggestion only: public-source accessibility and category/scope recommendations do not mark the candidate source_verified, approved, or reproduced. Manual confirmation remains required.
